_publications._publicationTitle: Proof of Concept for Genome Profiling of the Neurofibroma/Sarcoma Sequence in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: DNA samples extracted from benign tissue (selected by the pathologist from the plexiform neurofibroma sample), primary tumor sample diagnosed as MPNST
details: Used for quality assessment of DNA samples extracted from FFPE tissues prior to whole exome sequencing
